<li><br></li>
<li>At Stellartech Research Corporation, I attempted to connect with Liliane Opris, but she was engaged in a meeting. I inquired about alternative contacts and the preferred method to reach her. Kelly Dodge from the front desk suggested email as the most effective means. <b><br></b></li>

<ul>
<li>Natasha Oliveira<br></li>
<li>Hiring for Quality Manager <br></li>
<li>Monica at the Front Desk Interaction:</li>
<li>	Ą	Initial Info: Monica had just returned from a break.</li>
<li>	Ą	Past Interactions: Monica recalled several Slingshot co-workers visiting 2-3 months prior. Natasha Oliveira was not interested then.</li>
<li>	Ą	My Response: Pointed out the possibility of changed circumstances since that was a few months ago.</li>
<li>	Ą	MonicaŐs Feedback: They already have a partnership with a staffing agency that provides consistent support.</li>
<li>	Ą	My Proposition: Clarified that our aim isnŐt to replace their current staffing agency but to augment their support.</li>
<li>	Ą	Outcome: Monica was receptive to the idea. Plan to follow up with her, but she made no guarantees. <br></li>
</ul>
